description: Three property-based harnesses (PROP-CV-001 success-path port budget, PROP-CV-005 success-path emit count, PROP-CV-008 success-path ordering) used a fast-check generator whose value was never consumed by the test body, making 100 iterations functionally equivalent to one example test. Resolved in-place by wiring each generator into the body — generated path strings are now cast to VaultPath and used as userSelectedPath, so each run exercises a distinct input.

resolution.notes: Wired generators in across prop-cv-001, prop-cv-005, prop-cv-008. fc.nat replaced with fc.string({ minLength: 1 }) where needed. Generators now drive userSelectedPath.
